title: Download PACTA
subtitle: Get started in minutes
description: PACTA is a single binary with zero external dependencies. Download for your platform and run locally.

linux.name: Linux
installSteps: Download the .tar.gz file for your architecture
Move to PATH: sudo mv pacta /usr/local/bin/

macos.name: macOS
installSteps: Move to PATH: sudo mv pacta /usr/local/bin/

windows.name: Windows
installSteps: Move pacta.exe to a folder in your PATH
